name: The horrible inside
short_description: You have to plunge into the depths of madness and uncover the dark secrets that lurk within. With every step you take, you will encounter paranormal phenomena and ghosts of your past.
detailed_description:
The Horrible Inside is a terrifying first-person horror game that puts you in the heart of darkness. Embark on your own terrifying adventure, wandering through eerie corridors and labyrinths, encountering unimaginable horrors and solving diabolical puzzles.
You have to plunge into the depths of madness and uncover the dark secrets that lurk within. With every step you take, you will encounter paranormal phenomena and ghosts of your past.
As you explore the area, you will encounter a variety of puzzles that require keen observation and logical thinking. Some may involve solving cryptic codes, deciphering hidden messages, or even using your surroundings to outwit the creatures that are hunting you.
The game is controlled using the keyboard and mouse. To complete the game, you need to go through all the labyrinths and solve all the riddles and at the same time stay alive!
